name: ui-style-director
description: Create enforceable UI style contracts from requirements, code, visual drafts, and presets.

interface.shortDescription: Turn requirements and code into enforceable UI style contracts.
interface.longDescription: Analyzes product requirements, content, screenshots, and existing UI code to select or create a visual style, generate image prompts or drafts, produce a persistent UI style contract, and guide Codex implementation and review.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this app and create a UI style contract.
Apply the flat-white style to this frontend.
Review this UI against the style contract.
